description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a full stock and a prominent fore-end pump mechanism beneath the barrel. The receiver and barrel are streamlined, with the barrel extending forward in a straight, unadorned line. The stock is solid and ergonomically shaped, designed for shoulder support, and the grip area is smoothly contoured. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. The fore-end pump is ribbed for grip and sits below the barrel, indicating manual cycling of the action. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible embellishments or attachments, making it suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A matte black pump-action shotgun with a full stock, ribbed fore-end pump, and a streamlined, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel opening and the alignment of the fore-end pump beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, including the full stock, receiver, and ribbed fore-end pump.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the solid stock and the straight alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the stock and fore-end pump.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized, no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
